writers.lyricist: Eric Frederic/John Wicks/James King/Noelle Scaggs/Joseph Karnes/Jeremy Ruzumna/Sam Hollander/Michael Fitzpatrick
writers.composer: Eric Frederic/John Wicks/James King/Noelle Scaggs/Joseph Karnes/Jeremy Ruzumna/Sam Hollander/Michael Fitzpatrick

lyrics.text: (Turn it up)
lyrics.translation: 把音量调大！

lyrics.text: Somebody save your soul cause you've been sinning in this city I know
lyrics.translation: 我知道你曾在这座城市无恶不作 直到有人将你灵魂救赎

lyrics.text: Too many troubles, all these lovers got you losing control
lyrics.translation: 这些暧昧情人麻烦不断 让你失去了理智

lyrics.text: You're like a drug to me, a luxury, my sugar and gold
lyrics.translation: 你就像一剂猛药 吸睛的奢侈品 我的蜜糖与宝藏

lyrics.text: I want the good life
lyrics.translation: 我向往着美好生活

lyrics.text: Every good night you're a hard one to hold
lyrics.translation: 夜色之中的你如此火辣让我迷恋

lyrics.text: Cause you don't even know
lyrics.translation: 因为你不曾知晓

lyrics.text: I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我可以让你情不自禁雀跃鼓掌

lyrics.text: Said I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我说 我会让你为之卖力鼓掌

lyrics.text: Somebody save your soul cause you've been sinning in this city I know
lyrics.translation: 我知道你曾在这座城市无恶不作 直到有人将你灵魂救赎

lyrics.text: Too many troubles, all these lovers got you losing control
lyrics.translation: 这些暧昧情人麻烦不断 让你失去了理智

lyrics.text: You're like a drug to me, a luxury, my sugar and gold
lyrics.translation: 你就像一剂毒品 吸睛的奢侈品 我的蜜糖与宝藏

lyrics.text: I want your sex and your affection when they’re holdin’ you close
lyrics.translation: 当旁人向你咄咄逼近 我只想你为我尽态极妍 目不他望

lyrics.text: Cause you don't even know
lyrics.translation: 因为你不曾知晓

lyrics.text: I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我可以让你情不自禁雀跃鼓掌

lyrics.text: Said I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我说 我会让你为之卖力鼓掌

lyrics.text: Every night when the stars come out
lyrics.translation: 夜幕降临群星隐现

lyrics.text: Am I the only living soul around?
lyrics.translation: 我可否是你身旁唯一生气盎然的灵魂？

lyrics.text: Need to believe you could hold me down
lyrics.translation: 我必须坚信你会将我拥入怀中

lyrics.text: Cause I'm in need of somethin' good right now
lyrics.translation: 因为此刻我正渴望着美好事情的发生

lyrics.text: We could be screamin' till the sun comes out
lyrics.translation: 我们可以尽情狂欢直至旭日东升

lyrics.text: And when we wake we'd be the only sound
lyrics.translation: 苏醒之时 我们便是这世间唯一的声响

lyrics.text: I get on my knees and say a prayer: James Brown
lyrics.translation: 我跪地祈求 向着James Brown祷告（灵魂乐教父）

lyrics.text: That I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我能让你情不自禁雀跃鼓掌

lyrics.text: That I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我能让你为之卖力鼓掌

lyrics.text: (Turn it up)
lyrics.translation: 把音量调大

lyrics.text: That I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我能让你情不自禁雀跃鼓掌

lyrics.text: My flesh is searchin' for your worst and best, don't ever deny
lyrics.translation: 请别矢口否认 我的存在只为搜寻你的恶与善

lyrics.text: I'm like a stranger, gimme me danger
lyrics.translation: 我如同陌路行人 你让我心惊胆战

lyrics.text: All your wrongs and your rights
lyrics.translation: 你的那些是非对错

lyrics.text: Secrets on Broadway to the freeway, you're a keeper of crimes
lyrics.translation: 你是罪孽的保有者 隐匿着那些不可告人的秘密

lyrics.text: Fear no conviction, grapes of wrath can only sweeten your wine
lyrics.translation: 我可不相信愤怒之果可酿制甘甜之酒

lyrics.text: But you don't even know
lyrics.translation: 可是你不曾知晓

lyrics.text: I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我可以让你情不自禁雀跃鼓掌

lyrics.text: Said I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我说 我会让你为之卖力鼓掌

lyrics.text: Every night when the stars come out
lyrics.translation: 夜幕降临群星隐现

lyrics.text: Am I the only living soul around?
lyrics.translation: 我可否是你身旁唯一生气盎然的灵魂？

lyrics.text: Need to believe you could hold me down
lyrics.translation: 我必须坚信你会将我拥入怀中

lyrics.text: Cause I'm in need of somethin' good right now
lyrics.translation: 因为此刻我正渴望着美好事情的发生

lyrics.text: We could be screamin' till the sun comes out
lyrics.translation: 我们可以尽情狂欢直至旭日东升

lyrics.text: And when we wake we'd be the only sound
lyrics.translation: 苏醒之时 我们便是这世间唯一的声响

lyrics.text: I get on my knees and say a prayer: James Brown
lyrics.translation: 我跪地祈求 向着James Brown祷告（灵魂乐教父）

lyrics.text: That I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我可以让你情不自禁雀跃鼓掌

lyrics.text: That I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我会让你为之卖力鼓掌

lyrics.text: That I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我可以让你情不自禁雀跃鼓掌

lyrics.text: That I can make your hands clap
lyrics.translation: 我会让你为之卖力鼓掌

lyrics.text: So can I get a hand clap?
lyrics.translation: 所以我可否让你掌声不息？

lyrics.text: 贝斯 : Joseph Karnes/Ricky Reed
音频工程师 : Ethan Shumaker
萨克斯 : James King
混音助理 : Chris Galland/Ike Schultz
鼓编程 : Grant Michaels
主人声 : Fitz
